title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
summary: Hermes Agent 是一个由 Nous Research 开发的 AI 代理项目，旨在与用户共同成长。它支持多种大型语言模型（如 Anthropic 的 Claude、OpenAI 的 ChatGPT 等），并集成了多种工具和功能，如代码执行、文件操作等。该项目在 GitHub 上拥有 219 个星标，主要关注 AI 代理和 LLM 应用。
summary_en: Hermes Agent is an AI agent project developed by Nous Research, designed to grow with users. It supports various large language models (such as Anthropic's Claude, OpenAI's ChatGPT, etc.) and integrates multiple tools and features like code execution and file operations. The project has 219 stars on GitHub and focuses on AI agents and LLM applications.
